nodes.label: PythaFlow Positioning & Brand Discipline
nodes.rationale: Branded as the AI concierge for hospitality (not an 'AI platform' or 'automation agency'); copy leads with who it's for and business outcomes, not technology. Three-color system (Smoke White, Graphite Ink, Deep Teal), restraint as the premium signal. No case-study claims; sample data clearly labelled illustrative.
